# This file was automatically generated by the gun_demo script


aero BULLET_AERO  WSF_AERO
   reference_area   7.06858 cm2
   cl_max           0.001
   mach_and_cd       0.2    0.1
   mach_and_cd       0.8    0.25
   mach_and_cd       0.95    0.3
   mach_and_cd       1    0.35
   mach_and_cd       1.2    0.42
   mach_and_cd       1.7    0.38
   mach_and_cd       2    0.18
   mach_and_cd       3.5    0.12
end_aero



platform_type  BULLET WSF_PLATFORM
   icon gbu-15
   mover WSF_UNGUIDED_MOVER
      #show status
      update_interval   0.001 sec
      total_mass        0.671 kg
      aero              BULLET_AERO
   end_mover

 #processor WriteRangeSpeedData WSF_SCRIPT_PROCESSOR
 #  update_interval 0.01 sec
 #    on_update
  #     writeln(" Time ", PLATFORM.TimeSinceCreation(), " Range ", PLATFORM.GroundRangeTo(0,0,0), " Average Vel ", ((1021 + PLATFORM.Speed()) / 2) );
 #   end_on_update
 #end_processor
   processor fuse WSF_AIR_TARGET_FUSE
      gross_update_interval 0.01 sec
      fine_update_interval 0.001 sec
      gross_proximity_range  3 m
      hit_proximity_range 2 m
   end_processor
end_platform_type


weapon_effects BULLET_LETHALITY  WSF_GRADUATED_LETHALITY
   radius_and_pk      5 m   0.9
end_weapon_effects


# Finally we get to write out the weapon...

weapon BULLET WSF_EXPLICIT_WEAPON
    #launch_computer           BULLET_LAUNCH_COMPUTER   end_launch_computer
    launched_platform_type    BULLET
    weapon_effects            BULLET_LETHALITY
    slew_mode                 azimuth_and_elevation
       azimuth_slew_limits       -180 deg 180 deg
       elevation_slew_limits      -10 deg  85 deg
    quantity                  1200
    firing_delay              0 secs
    #firing_interval           10 secs  # cool down time after a salvo - total guess
    salvo_interval            0.0142857 sec
    launch_delta_v            1021 0 0 m/s
    automatic_target_cueing    true
    cue_to_predicted_intercept  true
end_weapon
